title: General Configuration
voting_restrictions_tooltip: Indicates how many participants a judge can vote at the same time. If left empty or 0, there is no restriction.
prop_num_judges: Default Judges to vote in Competitions
num_medals: By Number of Medals in Styles
qr_tooltip: Show the event QR to share the link
poster_tooltip: Generate the event poster as a PDF
poster_logo_help: Upload a PNG or JPG logo with a minimum of 300 px. A logo of at least 800 px, good quality, and ideally a transparent PNG is recommended.
event_status_modal_msg_finish: Are you sure you want to mark this event as finished?
event_status_modal_msg_open: Are you sure you want to open this event?
event_status_finish_info_title: By marking the event as finished:
event_status_finish_detail_1: Judges will no longer be able to submit votes
event_status_finish_detail_2: Master data, judges, participants, and competitions can no longer be modified
event_status_finish_detail_3: If enabled, an email will be sent to the participants or clubs (depending on configuration) with the access codes for statistics
event_status_finish_detail_4: If schools registered inscriptions, all audio files uploaded to the platform will be permanently deleted
visibility_modal_make_visible: Are you sure you want to mark the event as visible?
visibility_modal_hide_event: Are you sure you want to hide the event?
export_event_format_prompt: Choose the export format for Plan B.
export_event_confirm: Are you sure you want to export this event?
export_event_info: The export will generate a ZIP file with one PDF or Excel file per judge, depending on the selected format. This process may take a few seconds. Please do not close or refresh the page while export is in progress.
export_apply_restriction_voting_label: Do you want to apply voting restrictions when generating judge pages?
poster_error_missing_logo: You must select a logo to generate the poster.
poster_error_invalid_logo_type: The logo must be a PNG or JPG file.
poster_error_invalid_logo_file: The logo file could not be read.
poster_error_small_logo: The logo must be at least 300 px on its longest side.
event_info_description_help: Only safe formatting is stored: headings, paragraphs, bold, italic, underline, lists and links.
event_info_unsaved_confirm: There are unsaved changes. Do you want to leave without saving?
event_info_editor_unavailable: The event sheet editor is not available.
